creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like a rewording to me, no new information actually added, except
of what USE_LDCONFIG=yes do.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

The answer to the all-encompassing question on life, the universe
and everything: close windows and reboot.
